scientific_scope.purpose: Trace both numerical directions from the accepted C13-C21 first-order-saddle candidate; do not label either direction reactant or product before endpoint review.

common_protocol.force_constants: RCFC from the audited TS checkpoint

directions.route: #p wb97xd/6-31g(d) scrf=(smd,solvent=toluene) irc=(rcfc,forward,maxpoints=30,stepsize=5,maxcycle=40,recorrect=yes) geom=allcheck guess=read int=ultrafine scf=(tight,xqc,maxcycle=128)
#p wb97xd/6-31g(d) scrf=(smd,solvent=toluene) irc=(rcfc,reverse,maxpoints=30,stepsize=5,maxcycle=40,recorrect=yes) geom=allcheck guess=read int=ultrafine scf=(tight,xqc,maxcycle=128)

resources_per_direction.scheduling_note: Each direction requests the full 44-core node; the two jobs should be expected to run sequentially rather than concurrently on the stated single-node capacity.

acceptance_and_stop_rules: Treat Forward and Reverse as numerical labels until endpoint structures are reviewed.
A path ending only because MaxPoints is reached is not a minimum and does not establish endpoint identity.
On any corrector failure, fetch and preserve evidence, then stop without changing StepSize, MaxCycle, ReCorrect, integrator, method, solvent, resources, or chemistry.
No endpoint optimization, retry, cancellation, or IRC resubmission is authorized by approval of this proposal unless separately stated.
approval_required: Both fresh project names and remote directories
Permission to render coordinate-free AllCheck inputs and subsequently upload and submit each approved direction
